hooks.command: $j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($f) { $leaf = Split-Path $f -Leaf; git -C 'C:\Users\thoma\case' add $f; $staged = git -C 'C:\Users\thoma\case' diff --cached --name-only; if ($staged) { git -C 'C:\Users\thoma\case' commit -m "Update $leaf"; git -C 'C:\Users\thoma\case' push } }
